releaseNotes: PenguPlay playback hardening. Removes the blind four-second startup source rotation from the fullscreen and inline players: a source now changes only on a classified terminal error, a failed MIME or local-proxy recovery, a genuinely proven stall, or an explicit user selection. Adds one authoritative Media3 visual-state reducer so buffering is never shown as paused, and applies a stable buffering baseline (15s/70s min-max, 5s after-rebuffer, ~100MB target buffer). Automatic quality stays data-conscious and capped at 1080p while every higher quality remains manually selectable; exact quality groups, the manual quality ceiling, redirect-safe final-URL handoff, the TV season/episode guard, rich per-source metadata and evidence-based native playback diagnostics are preserved. Backend video relay stays off and standalone Vidlink stays disabled.
